name: Apricot Delights
recipeIngredient: 1 can (1 lb 4 oz) apricots; drained and pureed
1/2 cup Chopped almonds or 3/4 cup chopped walnuts
recipeInstructions: Combine Jell-O and sugar in a saucepan. Stir in apricots. Cook over low heat until the mixture begins to boil, or is clear and thickened. Remove from heat. Stir in nuts. Pour into a greased 9x5x3-inch loaf pan. Chill until firm. Cut into squares and roll in confectioners sugar. Let stand at room temperature to dry (3-4 hours). Roll in additional confectioners sugar. Store in a covered container, separating layers with wax paper. Makes 3 dozen.
